commands.review_summary:
This PR appends Skill Workshop prompt guidance for stronger skill authoring proposals and adds regression assertions that the guidance renders when `skill_workshop` is available.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +17. Total +25 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a prompt-guidance feature PR, not a bug report. The changed behavior is source-checkable through the generated system-prompt path and the added assertions.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the PR is a small maintainer-authored prompt/test change and this review found no actionable defect.

target.title: feat(agents): extend skill workshop authoring prompt
target.body:
## Summary
- Extend the Skill Workshop system prompt with skill-creator guidance for concrete examples, trigger descriptions, degrees of freedom, progressive disclosure, support files, and reviewer evidence.
- Add regression assertions so the authoring guidance remains in the generated agent system prompt.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/skill-workshop-prompt.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs job run testbox-changed` (`tbx_01kt7vqwkgwm7n5hwbk15rjc55`, exit 0)

## Review
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` reported no accepted/actionable findings.
target.author: vincentkoc
